ValidationRule.description: If S & D Parameter 9 is selected, its Target and Weightage are mandatory.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISBLANK( S_D_Parameter_9__c )), OR( ISBLANK( S_D_Parameter_9_Target__c ), ISBLANK( S_D_Parameter_9_Weightage__c ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Enter both Target and Weightage for S & D Parameter 9.
